subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath sent down every Name from heaven and hath adorned the preamble of the Book of Creation with His Most Exalted Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل الاسماء من السماء و طرز دیباج کتاب الانشاء باسمه العلی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Seal of the Prophets, @naming of children; of individuals
